---
title: "incplot-server Chart Gallery"
engine: knitr
params:
  server: "http://localhost:8080"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
# Set BASE so every bash chunk can use $BASE without repeating the URL.
# Override at render time: quarto render gallery.qmd -P server:http://host:port
Sys.setenv(BASE = paste0(params$server, "/incplot"))
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* Harmonise Bootstrap card chrome with the solarized-light chart background */
.card { background-color: #fdf6e3; border-color: #eee8d5; }
.card-header { background-color: #eee8d5; border-color: #eee8d5; color: #586e75; }
/* Keep any chart overflow within the card, not the page */
.card-body { overflow-x: auto; }
.copy-btn { float:right; background:none; border:1px solid #93a1a1; color:#657b83; border-radius:3px; padding:1px 8px; font-size:0.75rem; cursor:pointer; }
.copy-btn:hover { background:#ddd8c5; }
</style>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.copy-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var card = btn.closest('.card');
      var el = card && card.querySelector('.chart-text');
      if (!el) return;
      var bytes = Uint8Array.from(atob(el.dataset.b64), function(c) { return c.charCodeAt(0); });
      var text = new TextDecoder('utf-8').decode(bytes).replace(/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m/g, '');
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function() {
        var orig = btn.textContent;
        btn.textContent = '✓ Copied';
        setTimeout(function() { btn.textContent = orig; }, 1500);
      });
    });
  });
});
</script>
```

```{bash register-sources}
#| include: false
register() {
  curl -sf -X POST "$BASE/sources" \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d "$1" > /dev/null || true
}

register '{
  "name": "test-heatmap",
  "label": "Test heatmap",
  "sql": "SELECT a,b,c FROM (VALUES (1,2,3),(4,5,6),(7,8,9),(2,4,6),(3,6,9)) t(a,b,c)",
  "default_type": "heatmap"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-treemap",
  "label": "Test treemap",
  "sql": "SELECT label,val FROM (VALUES ('"'"'Go'"'"',42),('"'"'Python'"'"',89),('"'"'Rust'"'"',31),('"'"'TS'"'"',67),('"'"'C++'"'"',54)) t(label,val)",
  "default_type": "treemap"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-barhs",
  "label": "Test bar single series",
  "sql": "SELECT label AS x,val AS y FROM (VALUES ('"'"'Go'"'"',42),('"'"'Python'"'"',89),('"'"'Rust'"'"',31),('"'"'TS'"'"',67),('"'"'C++'"'"',54)) t(label,val)",
  "default_type": "barV"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-barhm",
  "label": "Test bar multi-series",
  "sql": "SELECT year AS x,agri AS y1,tech AS y2,health AS y3 FROM (VALUES (2020,20,45,35),(2021,22,50,28),(2022,18,55,27),(2023,25,48,27)) t(year,agri,tech,health)",
  "default_type": "barHM"
}'

register '{
  "name": "test-barh",
  "label": "Test horizontal bar",
  "sql": "SELECT label,val FROM (VALUES ('"'"'Go'"'"',42),('"'"'Python'"'"',89),('"'"'Rust'"'"',31),('"'"'TS'"'"',67)) t(label,val)",
  "default_type": "barH"
}'
```

## incplot Charts

Rendered by the [incplot](https://github.com/incom-0/incplot) CLI using braille-dot raster graphics and ANSI colour. Output is self-contained HTML with an embedded WOFF2 monospace font.

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Line <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/german_economy&type=line&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/german_economy&type=line&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Scatter <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/iris&type=scatter&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/iris&type=scatter&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Vertical Bar <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhs&type=barV&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhs&type=barV&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Horizontal Stacked Bar <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barHS&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barHS&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Horizontal Multi Bar <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barHM&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barHM&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Vertical Multi Bar <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barVM&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barhm&type=barVM&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

## gotui Charts

Rendered by the [gotui](https://github.com/metaspartan/gotui) TUI widget library. Block-shade characters (░▒▓█) are used for colour mapping, displayed via an embedded asciinema player.

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Heatmap <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-heatmap&type=heatmap&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-heatmap&type=heatmap&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Treemap <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-treemap&type=treemap&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-treemap&type=treemap&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Sparkline <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/german_economy&type=sparkline&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/german_economy&type=sparkline&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

## Pure-Go Charts

Rendered natively in Go — no external binary required.

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Histogram <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/wine_quality&type=hist&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/wine_quality&type=hist&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Box Plot <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/wine_quality&type=box&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/wine_quality&type=box&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-header}
Horizontal Bar <button class="copy-btn" title="Copy as plain text">Copy</button>
:::
::: {.card-body .p-0}
```{bash}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barh&type=barH&format=html&fragment=1&width=100"
printf '<div class="chart-text" style="display:none" data-b64="%s"></div>' \
  "$(curl -sf "$BASE/plot?source=$BASE/source/test-barh&type=barH&format=text&mono=1&width=100" | base64 -w 0)"
```
:::
:::
